name: Tunnel Drift
description: Tunnel Drift is an intense endless arcade racer where precision is key. Key Features: Heavy Duty Drifting: Experience unique handling as you drift a heavy truck through a 360-degree rotating tunnel. Endless Challenge: The further you go, the faster it gets. Procedurally generated levels mean no two runs are the same! High Score Hunt: Collect Rings to maximize your points and challenge players worldwide on the Global Leaderboard. Instant Action: Simple controls, hard to master gameplay. Just tap to drift and survive!
instructions: Controls Keyboard Left Arrow or A Rotate Tunnel Left Right Arrow or D Rotate Tunnel Right Mouse Touch Click Tap Left Side of Screen Rotate Left Click Tap Right Side of Screen Rotate Right
